---
title: "20 Years of Podcasts on iTunes"
description: "20 years ago today, podcasts went mainstream."
author: "synesis"
date: "2025-06-28"
categories: [Apple, podcasting, history, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![*Serial* podcast — emblematic of podcasting's reach two decades on. Photo: Wikimedia Commons. ([Source](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Podcast))](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

20 years ago today, podcasts went mainstream [[1]](#ref-1).

---

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] "Apple Takes Podcasting Mainstream." *Apple*. (See the original announcement on Apple.com.)

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_apple-takes-podcasting-mainstream-activity-7344864184360189953-Xm0-).*
